statement: In every magma, Equation 2815 (`x = ((y * z) * (z * z)) * w`) implies Equation 2093 (`x = ((y * x) * x) * (z * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0489
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op z z)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) x) (op z x))
